nl: Design a handheld environmental monitor that measures PM2.5, CO2, temperature, and humidity, runs 8 hours on a rechargeable battery, and syncs data via Wi-Fi or Bluetooth.

concepts.name: PocketSense — All‑in‑One Pocket Monitor
concepts.approach: Single compact handheld unit with integrated high‑accuracy sensors and onboard Wi‑Fi + Bluetooth for direct cloud and phone sync. Optimized for everyday consumers who want instant readings and cloud history from a small pocket device.
highlights: Sensors: laser scattering PM2.5 sensor (e.g., Sensirion SPS30 or Plantower PMS5003), NDIR CO2 sensor (Sensirion SCD4x / Senseair S8), SHT4x for temperature & humidity.
Power: single 3.7 V rechargeable Li‑ion pack (≈4000 mAh) sized for 8+ hours typical use; USB‑C charging with PD current limit and charge indicator.
Sampling & power management: adaptive sampling (e.g., 1 min baseline, 10–30 s when elevated pollution) and duty‑cycled NDIR measurement to conserve energy while keeping readings meaningful.
Connectivity: BLE Low Energy for real‑time mobile UI; 2.4 GHz Wi‑Fi (802.11 b/g/n) for background cloud sync and firmware updates. Automatic Wi‑Fi upload when on known networks.
UI & physical: 1.3" monochrome OLED for real‑time values, multi‑color LED ring for quick air‑quality status, single multifunction button, vibration alert for thresholds.
Data handling: local circular buffer (flash) storing up to ~30 days at 1‑min resolution; timestamped records; export via app or cloud.
Enclosure & ergonomics: palmable rounded ABS shell ~120×50×25 mm, pocket clip, ~160 g; front inlet with particulate flow path isolated from electronics.

concepts.name: ModuTrack — Modular Cartridge Monitor + Dock
concepts.approach: Two‑piece system: a lightweight handheld core that holds swappable sensor cartridges (CO2 or PM modules) and a home dock that provides Wi‑Fi, charging and extended logging. Targets field users who need replaceable consumable sensors, low carry weight, and flexible sync options.
highlights: Modularity: replaceable sensor cartridges (PM, CO2) allow field swap/upgrade without replacing whole device; common temp/humidity sensor in core (SHT4x).

Sensors: cartridge options include compact NDIR CO2 module (Senseair S8 / SCD4x) and compact laser PM module (Plantower or Honeywell style). Cartridges keyed to ensure correct airflow and calibration data stored in cartridge EEPROM.

Power & dock strategy: handheld contains a smaller 2500–3000 mAh Li‑ion cell sized for 8 hours by aggressive duty cycling and sensor sleep states; dock supplies constant power for continuous mode, recharges handheld via pogo pins.
Connectivity: handheld uses Bluetooth LE for mobile app sync in the field; dock provides Wi‑Fi (and optional Ethernet) to upload batched logs to cloud when docked.
Calibration & maintenance: cartridge swap triggers auto‑calibration routine; dock can run extended reference calibrations and sensor firmware updates.
UI & ergonomics: slim rectangle handheld with capacitive touch strip for quick nav, simple LED status, optional small e‑ink pocket display for long battery life while idle.
Use cases: rental/inspection fleets, classrooms or multi‑room deployments where central dock handles networking and charging while portable unit is optimized for weight and runtime.

concepts.name: FieldPro — Rugged Professional Logger
concepts.approach: Robust, accuracy‑first handheld designed for technicians and prosumers needing high fidelity measurements, extended onboard logging and both BLE and Wi‑Fi connectivity. Accommodates higher‑power sensors (active flow PM) while still meeting an 8‑hour battery runtime.
highlights: Sensors: high‑accuracy NDIR CO2 (industrial grade, e.g., Senseair S8 / SCD30), active‑flow laser PM2.5 sensor with small fan for representative sampling, industrial temp/humidity (e.g., SHT3x or SHT4x).
Power: higher capacity battery (2S Li‑ion pack ~5000 mAh) sized to support active flow PM pump and continuous sampling for 8 hours; fast USB‑C charging and optional vehicle DC adapter.
Data logging: internal microSD slot + 8GB internal flash for long missions; configurable sampling rates (1s–5min) with time sync via BLE or Wi‑Fi NTP; local CSV/JSON export.
Connectivity & integrations: BLE for mobile app control and live telemetry; Wi‑Fi for direct cloud upload and OTA firmware updates; supports MQTT and HTTP APIs for enterprise integration.
UI & durability: transflective color LCD for outdoor readability, three physical buttons and a ruggedized rubber overmold, IP54 rated enclosure, lanyard / belt clip and glove‑friendly controls.
Accuracy & validation: on‑device calibration routines, user‑triggered span checks with reference gas (for CO2), and sensor health diagnostics exposed to the app.
Accessories: charging cradle with Ethernet/Wi‑Fi, protective holster, field calibration kit, and optional smartphone GPS pairing for location‑tagged logs.
